pi_items.source: setup_task.sh CREATE TABLE statements verified by regex analysis
setup_task.sh SQL schema contains 6 FOREIGN KEY constraints: FK_Album_Artist, FK_Track_Album, FK_Track_Genre, FK_Track_MediaType, FK_PlaylistTrack_Playlist, FK_PlaylistTrack_Track
setup_task.sh SQL schema contains 22 total columns across all 7 tables: Artist(2), Album(3), MediaType(2), Genre(2), Track(9), Playlist(2), PlaylistTrack(2)
setup_task.sh lines 10-72 create file at this exact location
setup_task.sh lines 74-96 create file at this exact location
install_drawio.sh line 52 specifies DRAWIO_VERSION="26.0.9"; GitHub release confirmed at https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/tag/v26.0.9 with AppImage file drawio-x86_64-26.0.9.AppImage

pi_items.metadata_value: Use Crow's Foot notation for relationship lines
pi_items.verified_value: Crow's Foot notation is standard for ER diagrams to represent cardinality (1-to-many, many-to-many relationships)
pi_items.source: Task description line 5 and er_requirements.txt line 80; Crow's Foot notation documented at https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/crows-foot-notation-relationship-symbols-and-how-to-read-diagrams/ and https://www.drawio.com/blog/crows-foot-notation

pi_items.verified_value: Chinook is a real, publicly available sample database representing a digital media store. Full Chinook database contains 11 tables (album, artist, customer, employee, genre, invoice, invoice_line, media_type, playlist, playlist_track, track). This task uses a 7-table subset.
pi_items.source: GitHub lerocha/chinook-database and setup_task.sh SQL comments; verified at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Crow's Foot ER diagram from a Chinook Database subset containing 7 entities (Artist, Album, Track, Genre, MediaType, Playlist, PlaylistTrack) with 6 verified foreign key relationships and 22 total columns. The SQL schema is synthetically generated by the setup script but based on the real, publicly available Chinook sample database. Draw.io version 26.0.9 is specified for the diagramming application. The schema file location is /home/ga/Desktop/chinook_subset_schema.sql and the expected outputs are /home/ga/Diagrams/chinook_er_diagram.drawio (editable) and /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/chinook_er_diagram.png (export).
